'''âsh-r-v''' ('''kasharav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stalinize|stalinize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stalinize|stalinize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-r-v
|-
! Lemma
| kasharav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisharav|thisharav]] || [[word:jisharav|jisharav]] || [[word:shisharav|shisharav]] || [[word:kisharav|kisharav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusharav|thuthusharav]] || [[word:jujusharav|jujusharav]] || [[word:shushusharav|shushusharav]] || [[word:kukusharav|kukusharav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusharav|thusharav]] || [[word:jusharav|jusharav]] || [[word:shusharav|shusharav]] || [[word:kusharav|kusharav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusharav|thusharav]] || [[word:jusharav|jusharav]] || [[word:shusharav|shusharav]] || [[word:kusharav|kusharav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesharav|thesharav]] || [[word:jesharav|jesharav]] || [[word:shesharav|shesharav]] || [[word:kesharav|kesharav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosharav|thothosharav]] || [[word:jojosharav|jojosharav]] || [[word:shoshosharav|shoshosharav]] || [[word:kokosharav|kokosharav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosharav|thosharav]] || [[word:josharav|josharav]] || [[word:shosharav|shosharav]] || [[word:kosharav|kosharav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosharav|thosharav]] || [[word:josharav|josharav]] || [[word:shosharav|shosharav]] || [[word:kosharav|kosharav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsharav|thĂŠsharav]] || [[word:jĂŠsharav|jĂŠsharav]] || [[word:shĂŠsharav|shĂŠsharav]] || [[word:kĂŠsharav|kĂŠsharav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasharav|thathasharav]] || [[word:jajasharav|jajasharav]] || [[word:shashasharav|shashasharav]] || [[word:kakasharav|kakasharav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasharav|thasharav]] || [[word:jasharav|jasharav]] || [[word:shasharav|shasharav]] || [[word:kasharav|kasharav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasharav|thasharav]] || [[word:jasharav|jasharav]] || [[word:shasharav|shasharav]] || [[word:kasharav|kasharav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasharav|shasharav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasharav|goshasharav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasharav|gokishasharav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasharavnĂŒ|shasharavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasharavnknĂŒ|goshasharavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharavnĂŒ|gokishasharavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasharavshĂ«|shasharavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasharavnkshĂ«|goshasharavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasharavshĂ«|gokishasharavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharavro|shasharavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharavnkro|goshasharavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharavro|gokishasharavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharavmu|shasharavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharavnkmu|goshasharavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharavmu|gokishasharavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasharavsher|shasharavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasharavnksher|goshasharavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasharavsher|gokishasharavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasharavng|shasharavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasharavnkng|goshasharavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasharavng|gokishasharavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasharavya|shasharavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasharavnkya|goshasharavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasharavya|gokishasharavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasharavyam|shasharavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasharavnkyam|goshasharavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasharavyam|gokishasharavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharavnĂŒshĂ«|shasharavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasharavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasharavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharavnĂŒro|shasharavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharavnknĂŒro|goshasharavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharavnĂŒro|gokishasharavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharavnĂŒmu|shasharavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharavnknĂŒmu|goshasharavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharavnĂŒmu|gokishasharavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharavshĂ«nĂŒ|shasharavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasharavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasharavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharavshĂ«ro|shasharavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharavnkshĂ«ro|goshasharavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharavshĂ«ro|gokishasharavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharavshĂ«mu|shasharavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharavnkshĂ«mu|goshasharavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharavshĂ«mu|gokishasharavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharavronĂŒ|shasharavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharavnkronĂŒ|goshasharavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharavronĂŒ|gokishasharavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharavroshĂ«|shasharavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharavnkroshĂ«|goshasharavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharavroshĂ«|gokishasharavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharavromu|shasharavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharavnkromu|goshasharavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharavromu|gokishasharavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharavmunĂŒ|shasharavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharavnkmunĂŒ|goshasharavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharavmunĂŒ|gokishasharavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharavmushĂ«|shasharavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharavnkmushĂ«|goshasharavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharavmushĂ«|gokishasharavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharavmuro|shasharavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharavnkmuro|goshasharavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharavmuro|gokishasharavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
